title: Cohesity / Tesla infrastructure standup — open cases
clean_summary: English-language standup on Cohesity/Tesla infrastructure: set-3 hardware refresh and node removal still in progress (Andrea/Kiarra action plan); GBC replacement / SFP cable change overdue (~20+ days) with Fabio to contact Jaluka by end of day; SQL-protected cluster risk if downtime repeats; additional cases on node removal (CCM), replication batch, HDD RMA closure, and data-protect backup restart (Freedom). Team asked Paolo to update owner column E. No new escalations from Fabio/Paolo; Mattia newly on the call.
